issue_body_preview:
<!-- Please use English -->
after the latest update the coins aren't loading on Exchange module

## Screenshot or description


When you switch to source swap, eg uniswap, the coins don't load. They show the message as on the screenshot...
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/8985507705
test_description_zh: 在 Exchange 模块中切换到 Quickswap 或其他去中心化交易源（如 Uniswap），观察代币列表是否正常加载和显示。
expected_result_zh: 切换到 Quickswap 或 Uniswap 等交易源后，代币列表应正常加载并完整显示可用代币，不应出现加载失败或空白提示信息。
